title: erigeron coronopifolius
intro: Erigeron coronopifolius, also known as Fleabane or Bachelor's Button, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as relieving fever, reducing pain, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Erigeron coronopifolius include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
